function(x0: Nat -> Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat -> Nat) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = arithmetic_fn_mul(x0, x2, x1) }(f, n, g)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 < x1 or x0 != x1 }[Nat](0, f(n))
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 < x1 or x0 != x1 }[Nat](0, g(n))
g(n) = 0 or f(n) = 0
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 < x1 or x1 <= x0 }(0, f(n) * g(n))
function(x0: Nat) { not x0 <= 0 or 0 = x0 }(f(n) * g(n))
function(x0: Nat -> Nat) { forall(x1: Nat) { not 0 < x1 or 0 < x0(x1) } = positive_on_positive(x0) }(arithmetic_fn_mul(f, g))
